prestazioni: Lamborghini L539 6.5L V12 naturally aspirated engine: Full titanium internals upgrade with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons to handle 1,200+ HP on E85 fuel. Pair with a custom Novitec Rosso Stage 3 ECU remap (optimized for aggressive ignition timing and 12.5:1 AFR under full load) and a Capristo 102mm titanium exhaust system with quad 100mm outlets and electronically controlled bypass valves for backpressure optimization.

Forced induction conversion using a pair of Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (1.06 A/R turbine housing, 82mm compressor wheel) with custom 3D-printed Inconel manifolds by SMS Engineering, feeding into a custom air-to-water intercooler setup from PWR with dual 400W Bosch pumps and a 10L ice reservoir for sustained track use. Boost controlled via an AEM CD-7 dash-integrated boost controller with 3D-mapped wastegate duty cycles (2.2 bar peak, 1.8 bar on overrun).

Chassis and drivetrain reinforcement: Full carbon fiber torque tube from Automobili Lamborghini Squadra Corse (SC18 spec) with a Quaife ATB differential (45% lock under load) and a custom 6-speed sequential transmission from Holinger (dog-ring engagement, pneumatic paddle shift, 50ms shifts). Suspension overhaul includes Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed rebound), spherical bearing control arms from 034 Motorsport, and a custom front sway bar from H&R (28mm adjustable stiffness). Braking system features 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors from Brembo (CCM-R compound) with 6-piston monoblock calipers and Ferodo DS3000 pads, paired with a custom ABS map from Bosch Motorsport (8-level intervention settings).
estetica: Full Liberty Walk LB Performance widebody kit (AVENTADOR LP700-4 specific, with extended carbon fiber fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser with integrated titanium supports). The kit includes a 50mm extended wheelbase conversion with custom subframe reinforcements for aggressive stance and tire clearance (Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R: 265/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear).

Custom Novitec Rosso Aeropack with a 3D-printed titanium rear wing (adjustable angle of attack via electric actuators, 0-15 degrees) and a front lip splitter with integrated active aero (Gurney flaps deploy at 120+ mph via hydraulic actuators). The entire aero package is CFD-optimized for 1,200 kg downforce at 180 mph, with a drag coefficient of 0.32. Paint scheme: Lamborghini Verde Ithaca (custom pearlescent mix) with exposed carbon fiber weave on the roof, mirrors, and diffuser, finished with a matte clear coat from PPG.

Interior overhaul with full Alcantara and carbon fiber trim from Sabelt (custom bucket seats with 6-point harnesses, Schroth Profi II-6 belts, and a FIA-approved roll cage from Matter Motorsport). Dash and infotainment replaced with a Motec C187 dash logger (12-inch display, CAN bus integration with the Holinger transmission and Öhlins suspension), paired with a custom titanium shift knob from BBI Autosport and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (suede-wrapped, 320mm diameter, integrated paddle shifters).
